name: Cipher Biplane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光波複葉機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイファー・バイプレーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn: You can target 2 "Cipher" monsters you control; their Levels become 8 until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cipher Biplane" once per turn. If a "Cipher" monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Cipher" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 2 "Cipher" monsters you control; their Levels become 8 until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cipher Biplane" once per turn. If a "Cipher" monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Cipher" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 2 "Cipher" monsters you control; their Levels become 8 until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cipher Biplane" once per turn. If a "Cipher" monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Cipher" monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
